payload.title: MTA 2026 Preliminary Budget
payload.description: Volume 2 of the MTA 2026 Preliminary Budget and July Financial Plan 2026-2029, containing MTA-Consolidated detailed financial and position schedules, Agency sections with supporting baseline tables, and MTA Capital Program information.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Grand Central Madison Operating Company (GCMOC)

payload.entity_name: MTA Grand Central Madison Operating Company

tool_args.label: Central Business District Tolling Program commenced

payload.description: Toll collection for the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP) commenced in January 2025. Legislated to annually generate and leverage one billion dollars dedicated to support $15 billion of bonding for the 2020-24 Capital Program and subsequent capital programs.

The July Plan includes proposals to increase fare and toll rates in January 2026, March 2027, and March 2029, with each increase projected to generate an additional 4 percent in farebox and toll revenues.

tool_args.label: NYCT Bus Radio System and Bus Command Center new positions

payload.claim_text: Seven (7) additional positions for comprehensive maintenance and support services for the Department of Buses' new digital radio system and the New Bus Command Center. Also included is the maintenance support for the new bus radio system at the depot and 39 new radio towers.
payload.subject: NYCT Bus Radio System and Bus Command Center

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Radio System and Bus Command Center

payload.claim_text: Comprehensive maintenance and support services for the Department of Buses new digital radio system and the New Bus Command Center. Also included is the maintenance support for the new bus radio system at the Depot and 39 new radio towers.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Radio System and Bus Command Center

tool_args.label: Proposed fare and toll increase revenue impact

payload.description: Additional farebox and toll revenue over the Plan period from proposed fare and toll increases
CBDTP annually generates and leverages one billion dollars dedicated to support $15 billion of bonding for the 2020-24 Capital Program and subsequent capital programs.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company re-examination of budgetary needs

payload.claim_text: The Plan also reflects lower costs resulting from a re-examination of budgetary needs at MTA Bus, primarily due to initiatives aimed at reducing expenses for Health & Welfare/OPEB, professional services, materials and supplies, and maintenance and other operating contracts.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company budgetary needs re-examination

payload.claim_text: New Needs and Investments, reflected in the Agency baseline financial plans, include funding for critical information technology, maintenance and operation, and service support initiatives.
payload.subject: MTA New Needs and Investments

payload.claim_text: Employee Availability – One (1) additional position for an initiative to reduce chronic absenteeism that leads to decreased operational efficiency, customer delays, and budget overruns.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Employee Availability
